General.Name: Hipages Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: hipages Group Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an online tradie marketplace in Australia and New Zealand. It provides hipages, an online tradie marketplace that provides local tradies with job leads, grow and manage their business; and Builderscrack, an online home repair and renovation marketplace that enables homeowners to connect with local tradies. The company also provides Tradiecore, a job management solution; and Proptech Labs, a property management productivity software. hipages Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2004 and is based in Sydney, Australia.

7.Name: Ms. Donna  Hole
7.Title: Senior Vice President of Customer Experience
